message:
fix: WebSocket race condition in kubectlProxy causing Safari errors (#4528)

Fix a race condition in execImmediate() where this.ws could transition
out of OPEN state between the readyState check and the send() call.
Safari reports this as "send was called before connect" (InvalidStateError).

Changes:
- Capture ws as a local variable after ensureConnected() to prevent the
  instance field from being nulled by a concurrent onclose handler
- Wrap ws.send() in try/catch to handle the InvalidStateError gracefully
  instead of letting it escape as an unhandled rejection
- Suppress "send was called before connect" and "InvalidStateError" in
  the analytics global error handler since they are transient and handled

This resolves ~37 ksc_error GA4 events/week from the /workloads page.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
